compiled_state.title: Implement DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 branch in write_commit_event and add test
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task
In plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh write_commit_event function, add an early check: if DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1, route to the pre-refactor python3-backed code path. Add a test in tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh (test_write_commit_event_legacy_flag) that sets DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 and uses a sentinel shim to assert python3 IS spawned. Testing mode: RED then GREEN (small implementation change needed).
